steps.title: Track the passage focus
steps.content: The text traces jazz tap from its origins in African American communities through its influence from jazz music and later evolution. Every sentence explains how the dance form developed.

steps.title: Match the main purpose
steps.content: Choice A is about audience preferences, which the passage never discusses. Choice C is about playing an instrument, and Choice D is about a famous dancer. The passage instead explains the growth of a dance form. The answer is B.
